---
title: "Examples"
description: "Copy-paste working examples: CSV filtering, JSON pivoting, remote parquet by bounding box, multi-source loading, and joining tables."
---

Working code for the most common data.js use cases. Each example is self-contained — copy it into a `<script>` tag after including data.js from the CDN (see [Quick Start](getting_started.qmd)).

## Filter a CSV

```javascript
Data.feed({
    source: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emergenzeHack/terremotocentro/master/data/issues.csv",
    type:   "csv"
}).load(function (mydata) {
    var facebookIssues = mydata.select('WHERE labels like "Facebook"');
    console.log(facebookIssues.column("id").values());
}).error(function (e) {
    console.error(e);
});
```

## Pivot election results

```javascript
Data.feed({ source: scrutiniUrl, type: "csv" }).load(function (scrutini) {
    var pivot = scrutini.pivot({
        lead:  "codice",
        keep:  ["tipo"],
        sum:   ["membri"],
        cols:  "descr_lista",
        value: "voti"
    });
    console.log(pivot.columnNames());
});
```

## Load a remote GeoParquet file by bounding box

```javascript
Data.feed({
    source:  "https://s3.eubucco.com/eubucco/v0.2/buildings/parquet/nuts_id=ITC4/ITC4.parquet",
    type:    "parquet",
    bbox:    [9.185, 45.460, 9.198, 45.468],
    columns: ["id", "subtype", "height"],
    maxRows: 50000
}).load(function (mydata) {
    console.log(mydata.records.length + " buildings in view");
}).error(function (e) {
    console.error(e);
});
```

See [Remote Parquet by Bounding Box](remote_parquet_bbox.qmd) for how CRS reprojection and the options work.

## Load three CSVs in parallel

```javascript
Data.provider()
    .addSource("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ondata/elezionipolitiche2018/master/dati/scrutiniCI_cm.csv", "csv")
    .addSource("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ondata/elezionipolitiche2018/master/risorse/comuniViminaleISTAT.csv", "csv")
    .addSource("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ondata/elezionipolitiche2018/master/dati/camera_geopolitico_italia.csv", "csv")
    .load(function (dataA) {
        var scrutini = dataA[0].select('WHERE tipo_riga == "LI"');
        console.log(scrutini.columnNames());
    });
```

## Join two already-loaded tables

```javascript
new Data.Merger()
    .addSource(prezzi,   { lookup: "idImpianto", columns: ["descCarburante", "prezzo", "isSelf", "dtComu"] })
    .addSource(impianti, { lookup: "idImpianto", columns: ["Bandiera", "Latitudine", "Longitudine"] })
    .realize(function (mergedTable) {
        console.log(mergedTable.columnNames());
    });
```

---

Ran into something these don't cover? Check [Troubleshooting](troubleshooting.qmd).
